description: REPO may only be used by one agent at a time
TEST_ENV may only be used by one agent at a time
BUILD_SERVER may only be used by one agent at a time
STAGING_ENV may only be used by one agent at a time
Interface changes in shared files must be communicated to all affected developers
TEST_WRITER must wait for feature code to stabilize before writing tests in TEST_ENV
All code must pass review before merge to REPO
CI on BUILD_SERVER must pass after each merge before next merge proceeds
Feature B (DEVELOPER_B) depends on Feature A (DEVELOPER_A, uses auth tokens); Feature C (DEVELOPER_C) depends on Feature B (payment event notifications)
REVIEWER approves or requests revisions for each feature
STAGING_ENV validation passes or fails; failure triggers rollback
Deployment ordering: Feature A merged and validated in STAGING_ENV before B, B before C
Implement -> test in TEST_ENV -> review -> merge to REPO -> CI on BUILD_SERVER -> STAGING_ENV validate -> release (full pipeline)
DEVELOPER_A needs REPO; DEVELOPER_B needs REPO; DEVELOPER_C needs REPO
Circular wait on REPO: three developers with overlapping file modification requirements
Deployment ordering deadlock: rollback of Feature A in STAGING_ENV blocks Features B and C from proceeding, potentially creating an infinite retry loop
